faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in West Farms typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas dying quickly after application. However, complete elimination including eggs and larvae typically takes 2-3 weeks with follow-up treatments to break the flea life cycle and ensure total eradication.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved, pet-friendly flea treatment products that are safe for both children and animals when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely, after which the space is safe to occupy.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my West Farms home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is essential for effective flea treatment. We recommend vacuuming all carpets and furniture, washing pet bedding in hot water, and temporarily relocating pets during treatment. Our technicians will provide a detailed preparation checklist when scheduling your West Farms appointment.
